name: Interval HUD Bar Overlay UI
purpose: Wide interval-training HUD showing current rep, phase, remaining work, live metrics, and optional lap/zone bar.

include: bottom bar modes: none, lap progress, HR zones, pace zones

dataSources.liveMetrics: ActivityTimeline sample methods at elapsed time

repRules.work: current active lap ordinal among active laps
repRules.rest: next active rep number after the completed work lap

layout.separators: thin vertical separators between main blocks
layout.bottomBarPlacement: inside the same container near bottom edge

metrics.layoutRule: Enabled REP, PHASE, REMAINING, HR ZONE, and every configured metric use equal-width cells. Empty metric space is not reserved when the metric list is empty.
metrics.numericOverlayCoverage: All OverlayElementType values where isNumericOverlay is true are available as Interval HUD Bar metrics.

hrZone.hrDropAtRest: Show HR Zone during training and switch to HR Drop only while the current lap kind is REST.
hrZone.hrDropModePlacement: HR Drop bpm/% control lives under the HR Zone settings.

lapProgress.label: LAP PROGRESS
lapProgress.glow: Glow highlights the completed portion. Intensity is editable; color follows the current phase.

heartRateZones.label: HR ZONES
heartRateZones.marker: active segment uses full opacity; inactive segment opacity is user-adjustable and must remain readable on the black HUD background
heartRateZones.activeZoneWidth: Equal width by default; optionally expand the active segment up to 50% of the full bar, with inactive segments sharing the remaining width evenly.

zoneMarker.valueLabel: optional current HR value, colored with the active zone

heartRateZones.glow: Glow highlights the active segment. Intensity is editable; color follows the active zone.

paceZones.label: PACE ZONES
paceZones.visualPattern: same segmented strip as HR zones
paceZones.zoneMarker: Single solid marker points at the current pace inside the matched pace segment; value label is optional.
paceZones.glow: Glow highlights the active segment. Intensity is editable; color follows the active zone.

typography.guidance: Expose every role independently so users can tune high-emphasis data separately from compact labels and unit suffixes.

controls.bottomBarEnabled: Section-header switch in the Bottom Bar header, before the disclosure chevron.
controls.bottomBarSpacing: Adjusts vertical gap between HUD content cells and the bottom bar. Zero is adjacent; larger values move the row and bar farther apart. Rendered layout preserves spacing before compressing top/bottom padding, then caps spacing only if required to keep the data row and bar inside the background.
controls.bottomBarBelowMarkerClearance: Zone Marker floats outside bottom-bar layout and never reserves height. Above/Below markers may overlap HUD text or extend beyond the background without changing other component positions.
controls.metricUnits: Each Metrics row stores its own unit option when the selected Numeric Overlay metric supports multiple units.

inspector.sectionOrderRequirement: The final four sections are Divider, Background, Border, Effects. Background, Border, and Effects must use shared inspector modules.
